name: python3-metaconfig
title: python3-metaconfig
description:
Python ConfigParser bootstrapping library (Python3)
Metaconfig is a library for centralising Python's ConfigParser files.
It is inspired by the logging module where it is increadibly easy to start
writing code that depends on logging whilst deferring how log messages will
be handled until later.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-metaconfig because Python ConfigParser bootstrapping library (Python3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-metaconfig as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-metaconfig with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-metaconfig --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
